prompt: Generate a high-speed image of this character crying tears of joy while expressing immense gratitude and absolute emotional collapse in response to unexpected photos or video of their favorite idol. However, do not draw the idol themselves. This is an image of 9 stamp variations centered on the feeling of "precious" drawn on a single white background. Note that the word "precious" itself should only be written on one of the nine. Also, include at least one stamp among the nine that conveys "being moved to the point of speechlessness." Each of the nine should be for a different use or situation.
